steps: Prepare stock of labelled target strand DNA to be 100 µL of 100 nanomolar (nM) .

Mix 50 µL of 100 nanomolar (nM) labelled target strand with 50 µL of 120 nanomolar (nM) unlabelled nontarget strand to make a 100 µL stock of duplex substrate. Reverse concentrations for labelled nontarget, unlabelled target.

Mix 1:1.2 molar ratio of 32 P labelled target strand (TS) to unlabelled nontarget strand (NTS) of duplex substrate: Stock of unlabelled TS at 50 µL , 120 nanomolar (nM) : dilute 4.48 µL TS stock in 45.42 µL DEPC. Stock of unlabelled NTS at 50 µL , 120 nanomolar (nM) : dilute 3.56 µL TS stock in 46.44 µL DEPC.
Place on 95 °C heat block for 00:02:00 - 00:05:00 , then slow cool for about 02:00:00 . This is the Duplex DNA stock for cleavage assays. DNA stock was diluted to 120nM with CasX reaction buffer.
Prepare CasX reaction buffer .
Mix together 20 millimolar (mM), HEPES (pH 7.5) , 10 millimolar (mM), magnesium chloride , 150 millimolar (mM), potassium chloride , 1 % volume, glycerol , and 0.5 millimolar (mM), TCEP .
Prepare CasX dilution buffer .
Mix together 500 millimolar (mM), NaCl , 10 % volume, glycerol , 20 millimolar (mM), Tris-HCl (pH 7.5) , 1 millimolar (mM), magnesium chloride , and 0.5 millimolar (mM), TCEP .
Prepare quencher .
Mix together 0.5 microgram per milliliter (μg/mL), heparin and 25 millimolar (mM), EDTA .
Dilute CasX to 4 micromolar (µM) in CasX dilution buffer (components shown above in go to step #2 ).
Dilute sgRNA to 6 micromolar (µM) in CasX reaction buffer (components shown above in go to step #1 ).
Mix an equimolar ratio of CasX and sgRNA ( 2 µL sgRNA stock, 3 µL CasX stock, 1 µL CasX reaction buffer ).
Allow samples to mix for 00:30:00 at Room temperature .
Dilute annealed, labelled duplex DNA into CasX reaction buffer ( 2 µL Duplex DNA stock, 43 µL reaction buffer ).
Add RNP stock ( 5 µL , 2 micromolar (µM) RNP) to the DNA:buffer mixture. Total volume should now be 50 μl.
Incubate at 37 °C . For each timepoint (0, 1, 5, 10, 30, 60, 120 minutes), remove 5 µL and add to a tube filled with 5 µL quencher (CasX mixture and quencher solution should have equal volumes).
Incubate with quencher solution at Room temperature for 00:05:00 .
Add 5 µL formamide loading dye and incubate at 95 °C for 00:05:00 .

After quenching, load samples (4 μl/well, i.e. approximately 200 cpm/well was loaded per sample) on a 12 % PAGE gel and run at 40 – 45 W for 00:45:00 . Large gel was pre-warmed at 25W for ~45minutes. Loading less (50-100cpm/well) sample works fine. You may need to expose overnight.
Prepare Formamide Loading Dye (2x concentrated).
Add 20 mL, formamide .
Add EDTA to a final concentration of 10 millimolar (mM) ( 2.2 mL of 100 millimolar (mM) stock).
Add a spatula tip-ful of powdered xylene cyanol.
Add a spatula tip-ful of powdered bromophenol blue.
creator: Meredith Triplet
